description: Default capability set for Py-feat Live. The Rust shell drives all subprocess spawning directly via std::process — no JS-callable shell APIs are exposed. The `remote` URLs grant IPC to the SPA, which is served by the bundled backend at http://127.0.0.1:<port> (the webview is navigated there after the splash); without it Tauri injects no IPC at that remote origin, so the SPA can't receive menu:// events (Settings / Check for Updates) or use the updater. Scoped to loopback only — the app's own backend plus the Vite dev server.
